SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, SUSAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIN, RADBERT JONAS AKA R.J. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SUSAN WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LENN CAMERON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RADBERT JONAS CHIN AKA R.J. CHIN IS PRESENT. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST LENN CAMERON AS AN INDIVIDUAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICES ON FILE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
